name: Security / Injection Defense
owns: Input threat filtering, trust-tiering, action gating for external content
must_never: Assume content is safe because it is internal-looking
Allow EXTERNAL tier content to upgrade its own trust tier
Silently drop inputs (blocked inputs are logged, not discarded)
Prevent audit log write even if blocking the input
notes: Action gate is provenance-based structural barrier, not content filter. Reads tool risk from C12 registry (no duplication). C17 stub: inter-agent messages default EXTERNAL. Semantic detection deferred (needs embedding model).
